hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multiple KYC providers into one orchestration layer that structures customer onboarding, preserves audit evidence, and streamlines regulatory rule updates.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with scattered identity verification results across multiple KYC providers, causing slow onboarding and inconsistent review processes. This fragmentation weakens audit readiness and makes it difficult to trace decisions or link evidence effectively across cases.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY centralizes multiple KYC provider data streams into a unified workflow that structures reviews, aggregates evidence, records decisions and supports audit-ready case management for faster, consistent onboarding.
workflow_title: From KYC provider outputs to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects multiple KYC provider outputs, applies internal rules, routes reviews, creates cases, preserves evidence and supports compliance decisions efficiently.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects multiple KYC provider outputs into one orchestrated layer that supports structured reviews, decision logging and audit-ready compliance evidence without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP compliance teams by integrating multi-provider KYC workflows with audit evidence and bank due diligence in enterprise-ready deployments.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYC checks become structured onboarding cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence is preserved from KYC results
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how provider orchestration supports multi-jurisdiction compliance
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP compliance teams a connected layer that connects KYC outputs into structured reviews, cases, decision logs and regulatory rule updates across jurisdictions and product lines.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY orchestrate multiple KYC providers?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and consolidates results from multiple KYC providers, applying internal rules to route reviews, trigger cases and maintain workflow consistency without vendor lock-in.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready KYC evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves onboarding case history, decision logs and supporting documents to support audit-ready evidence and traceability throughout identity and corporate client reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects seamlessly with existing KYC, KYB, KYT and screening providers, complementing current tools without requiring replacement or disruption.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC providers or tools?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above KYC providers, turning their outputs into structured workflow, cases and compliance controls rather than replacing underlying services.
final_title: Connect multiple KYC providers into one layer
final_description: Review how SFTY integrates KYC outputs into structured workflows, audit-ready evidence and regulatory rule updates for VASP compliance.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
